critical_code_review_comments: === REFACTORING VERIFICATION ===
VERIFIED: App.js reduced from 830 lines to 134 lines
VERIFIED: useAppState.js custom hook (511 lines) - all state management extracted correctly
VERIFIED: AppHeader.js - renders title, trading mode badge, settings button, auto-analyze toggle, refresh button, Analyze Now button
VERIFIED: PortfolioCards.js - renders Portfolio Value, Total P&L, Active Positions, Win Rate cards
VERIFIED: LivePositions.js - conditional rendering for LIVE mode with broker connected
VERIFIED: NotificationToasts.js - notification system with proper styling
VERIFIED: AppFooter.js - version number and design credit visible
=== UI COMPONENTS VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: App title 'AI Trading Bot' renders correctly
VERIFIED: Trading mode badge shows 'LIVE TRADING'
VERIFIED: Market ticker shows Nifty 50, Sensex, Bank Nifty, Fin Nifty
VERIFIED: Risk Management panel with Daily Used, Max Per Trade, Today's Trades, Today's P&L, Stop Loss
VERIFIED: Auto-Trading Settings section visible
VERIFIED: AI Loss Prevention Guards section visible (9/9 Active)
VERIFIED: Footer with design credit (9x.Design) and risk disclaimer
=== TAB NAVIGATION VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: All 12 tabs present and clickable: News Feed, Signals, Active Trades, Trade History, Calculator, Trade Analytics, Tax Reports, AI Brain, Technical, Option Chain, AI Journal, System Health
VERIFIED: System Health tab shows ALL SYSTEMS GO with v15.0.0, Routes 13/13, AI Guards 9/9
=== SETTINGS PANEL VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: Settings button opens settings panel
VERIFIED: Settings panel has Broker, Trading, Risk, Schedule, Advanced tabs
=== CODE QUALITY ===
GOOD: Clean component separation with proper prop passing
GOOD: All data-testid attributes preserved from original App.js
GOOD: useAppState hook exports all necessary state and actions
GOOD: Proper import structure in refactored App.js
